label: Scenario part
description: Defines a reusable scenario part that can be added to scenarios. Controls which C# class implements the part and how it interacts with scenario editing and generation.

category.label: Category
category.description: Grouping category for this scenario part. Controls where it appears in the scenario editor and how it is treated during scenario generation.

scenPartClass.label: Scenario part class
scenPartClass.description: C# class that implements this scenario part. Must extend ScenPart.

summaryPriority.label: Summary priority
summaryPriority.description: Controls ordering in the scenario summary display. Higher values appear first (sorted descending). Defaults to -1.

selectionWeight.label: Selection weight
selectionWeight.description: Relative weight used when this part is randomly added to a scenario. Defaults to 1.

maxUses.label: Max uses
maxUses.description: Maximum number of times this part can be added to a single scenario. Defaults to 999999.

canBeRandomlyAdded.label: Can be randomly added
canBeRandomlyAdded.description: Whether this part can be automatically added during random scenario generation. Defaults to true.

canBePlayerAddedRemoved.label: Can be player added or removed
canBePlayerAddedRemoved.description: Whether the player can manually add or remove this part in the scenario editor. Defaults to true.

pageClass.label: Page class
pageClass.description: C# class for the configuration page shown when this part is selected for editing, if any.

gameCondition.label: Game condition
gameCondition.description: GameConditionDef applied or managed by this scenario part.

gameConditionTargetsWorld.label: Game condition targets world
gameConditionTargetsWorld.description: When true, the game condition is applied to the world rather than the local map. Defaults to false.

durationRandomRange.label: Duration random range
durationRandomRange.description: Randomised duration in days for game conditions started by this part. Defaults to 30~100.

designatorType.label: Designator type
designatorType.description: C# Designator class whose use is restricted by this scenario part (used by rule-based parts).

genStep.label: Gen step
genStep.description: GenStepDef that this scenario part enables, disables, or modifies.

preventRemovalOfFaction.label: Prevent removal of faction
preventRemovalOfFaction.description: FactionDef whose scenario parts cannot be removed when this part is active.

basic-scen-part.label: Basic scenario part
basic-scen-part.description: Minimal scenario part with category and implementation class.

game-condition-scen-part.label: Game condition scenario part
game-condition-scen-part.description: Scenario part that starts a game condition with a random duration.

map-gen-toggle.label: Map gen toggle scenario part
map-gen-toggle.description: Scenario part that disables a map generation step.
